name: Chocolate Peanut Butter Bars
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup + 2 tbsp melted butter or margarine
12 oz milk chocolate or semisweet chocolate, melted
recipeInstructions:
1. Have ready a 13 x 9 inch baking pan.
2. Mix the powdered sugar, cracker crumbs, peanut butter, and melted butter in a medium-sized bowl until blended.
3. Spread the mixture into an ungreased baking pan and press it into an even layer.
4. Drizzle the melted chocolate over the top of the mixture.
5. Refrigerate at least 2 hours until the chocolate is firm.
6. Let stand at room temperature for 15 to 20 minutes before cutting with a sharp knife into bars.
Makes 36 bars
Per bar: 173 calories, 3g protein, 18g carbs, 10g fat, 10mg cholesterol (with butter), 1 mg cholesterol (with margarine), 113mg sodium.
